name: Greater Georgia
subject: ICYMI: BIDEN'S INFLATED POLICIES ARE ALREADY FLASHING RED
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, MAY 17, 2021
ICYMI: BIDEN'S INFLATED POLICIES ARE ALREADY FLASHING RED
ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler penned an [op-ed for Townhall](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eJwuJ0l_6bbxERqDnuSeXKraYhb3qHfqSvWSxicwAtJDR2cWG5qgUPb1i8mpom3bMIJj7H5ZVnWqAM8InqJSC16B2ksShRTPB4T5r5lryNJLtLwfP2XGon0sCd_VaakJXC5qYQt6dsL0BzEIpo_dF99mzjnlo-VgdX4SsiOWF_NZZcsjIaap4e_uGQ66mrGDdELPs15hgyFZ_t-h70O3VyOZoduovjk_iA==&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1), hitting Joe Biden for his disastrous economic policies that have stunted our recovery, as evidenced by the April jobs report. The op-ed slams Biden's billions in wasteful spending and partisan boondoggles (like expanding Obamacare and pandering to teachers' unions), as well as his job-killing agenda that ended the Keystone XL Pipeline and has threatened America's energy-independence. Read the full text of Kelly's op-ed below:
[Biden's Inflated Policies Are Already Flashing Red](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eJwuJ0l_6bbxERqDnuSeXKraYhb3qHfqSvWSxicwAtJDR2cWG5qgUPb1i8mpom3bMIJj7H5ZVnWqAM8InqJSC16B2ksShRTPB4T5r5lryNJLtLwfP2XGon0sCd_VaakJXC5qYQt6dsL0BzEIpo_dF99mzjnlo-VgdX4SsiOWF_NZZcsjIaap4e_uGQ66mrGDdELPs15hgyFZ_t-h70O3VyOZoduovjk_iA==&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1)
Americans want little more than their lives to return to normal, to get back to school and work so that their families can prosper. But with the virus tapering off, the Biden administration sees their window of opportunity to radically change our country beginning to close. Thanks to the pro-growth policies of the Trump administration, first quarter GDP rose a healthy 6.4 percent, economic output is at pre-pandemic levels, retail sales are up and consumers are flush with cash. Ignoring the economic recovery, the Biden administration has embraced a "Help is on the way" refrain, rather than embracing the momentum driven by reopening. Now data confirms the administration's earliest policies are pressuring our economic recovery.
Start with April's [disastrous](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eJwuJ0l_6bbxBz1duoM9CNq_A4MKAnxYArUXyErf4ANSzQbGIzPfwt_j1YOVgpSz-MeVfnBOH5c6VOUh7i3rkoEhijFz0X1sdHNgmqO8RkgLPxaARxDLd9ER4R_0cb2E9ePxuDyiU5qvF92UHVOytB0U8Wg23p-4xtvsZBNrjL1z&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1) jobs report that missed expectations by an unprecedented 750,000 jobs. At the same time, help-wanted signs abound with a record-setting 8.1 million job openings, alongside rising average wages. Federal benefits now incentivize extended unemployment, with millions of small businesses unable to hire sufficiently to fully reopen. On average, weekly unemployment benefits are nearly $650, roughly equals about $15 per hour for a 40-hour work week. So it's not surprising to see why small businesses are struggling to compete with the government for their employees. And while wage inflation is occurring, it won't go toward quality-of-life improvements if inflationary policies continue. Workers will need those pay hikes amid rising prices for gasoline, food and housing, thanks to this tax-and-spend playbook.
The risks to a strong, rapid recovery don't end with dislocations in the labor and commodity markets. When you add the full context of the administration's ominous policies - from open borders to wasteful spending - you can sense the headwinds to our continued economic recovery and security.
One of President Biden's first acts was to sign an executive order cancelling the Keystone Pipeline, destroying thousands of jobs and preventing the creation and preservation of many more. Keystone was set to build on our newly achieved energy independence from the Middle East - at a time when Iranian-funded Hamas is conducting strikes on Israel. With the stroke of a pen, Biden signaled his eagerness to trade away our hard-earned energy independence for the Green New Deal, and to [cancel](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eMu0OjOBqT3J9ZLeQkRPk8eBad0m9wsAeIiRYqslGRC922PFaDF53bp_bG2-5_ct_8jkCulACZO0mhGhx7-NydBSbut3pt-UHxPpbJmahYfFvWO8Wa9CHLjbwVvYrO4BS3Hxtf4NUVzo0X87vabXkOMQ9VHcYNj1j4Vf-93ZzuKv7iH4ym6NQ9Xl5TPXfaZgCf9BG_dVdx3Xo8cmQtJfMko=&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1) thousands of jobs in the process. Not to mention the fact that these very policies put families needlessly at risk of facing the kinds of power outages and gasoline shortages we've already seen across Texas and the South. As if that's not enough damage for the first hundred days, Biden's record-setting spending bills are adding to our national debt, putting more of America's future in the hands of foreign debtors. While the $1.9 trillion "American Rescue Plan" held some needed relief, the vast majority was crammed with partisan [boondoggles](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eJwuJ0l_6bbxJ95nmAHKi_D1KIUvnbHmo0bvwO9xWAU93E9w5LjKVlKFXl8eTpGfqpFf6sEoUweMU_0ARE7Kgcx3TY1UPrFEnIEkYqvEzDNr5npqLg3w6jI8q2xheuUVlDdaj_VEH2Gd_3FfBZ3MQjeDjKTaIt0lwG6S41bU96WoyQtnZgTJb1E=&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1), [including](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eJwuJ0l_6bbx2pAejsQMX0WN27UZcuUKVugbj6A4f2ozStI1JgBMqn5VipGn6bruBs2aYvHqfIItCoH9sNXemguuN-2PTP3osiXZWgEKJkF6T90kkgnYGQg708w0CkQChafllcuSLWjHbyNKMOFoeODDQQxw_y8E6Pxfj7Xb_QQz2lLIzlLsLgw=&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1) millions to expand Obamacare and billions to pay off teachers' unions who kept kids out of school, and to states who kept their residents locked down. Just 10 percent of that bill was [designated](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eJwuJ0l_6bbxQjgMjBzLEFpsPaWXfpHQKV6Wwscsc4oqM_5LaXqgY_gSc-ybSjJ2OCy0Im8sz3T2gdaspu9YggdTq10XI5WmhH2hsLk-5--mXPLRR7ZM-Gy4gm4o-p20vo2rc78n5OndMlrzBzPZyD0tIFwemBxMgSZVEFUc-1n9if_UhCAxDmsVwerMfwmaLI5Axs8VPEgg6cdUTltisss=&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1) for coronavirus relief, despite the nearly $1 trillion that remained unspent in Congress's 2020 relief bills.
But the sugar rush of policy proposals continues, keeping taxpayers on the hook and government at the center of our economy, crowding out small business and consumers. First, the Biden administration's $2 trillion "infrastructure" plan, which allocates less than 5 percent for true infrastructure such as roads and bridges, [adds](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eMu0OjOBqT3J3mqr_veU-3dHdie8Wnp0_xmnLrb_4Y_VEK0HVKLkNpQTn-z9TAFbEeNseO8y1upo4TogkaW721USN0Mz8wIuLjj-TySTqy-vTqdZx-LSbUIY9cTXv0s2EKK3Zu2lqUZBIC6UJ-AdPGGNH8vm9SW0Bwjsy56o_hjVAwrA_4U9mVktj-dzYjkdLHD7elvPgqu9cGSy4dniv0kAr-3TnoZOcA==&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1) a massive tax hike that would pressure wages and job creation, transfer billions of taxpayer dollars to corporate welfare, increase regulation and add billions to expand government programs. Second, their $2.5 trillion "families" plan would create more entitlement programs, [saddle](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eMu0OjOBqT3JmFF0_7AfnQH2N_99ttQm8d6MtUA1PSLB4bXUl3h64JxPkJPAqld-NVdl-8nSjSyBlWXJv-syob4EuzB_i_NAZ97094I8pHZTJuAm7ykvNsAmxHzBxvK2tt0RFL-h1ItA8QFQmdFWbUQeJ5-zL3OJH5Kdpt4QaTGCwvY8UoYi9dGDHPlufRpKflhkeIDUxnc_l_k8iJaTybM=&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1) future generations with more debt, pressure the economy by [forcing](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017F_EtSa9TDk7ydfcnK6qZ73ZE-ntaMWDZZCsNE-jVs1FapXg-Yq3eMu0OjOBqT3JGlYtZhngUxOFcoqE0Qbgl6gZHNBzjMlnB5wLkWeNjm8JKy9DaLMovHtPAfQ-sEv57e9K-haRyDwHEk_5H8FUqjZYI47LP8urbfWKnzWb7mbIVtGAOWoU6UPiAMaPD31ZJ4J25_3OjubAssOpiZ7---GwjDuWXOwPNPO0bNE20-TVjayGurWEVQ18ueHfvE1RAxdWHJj9Sn4=&c=qZFY-RXG-QUA5GXVeTOjMvYcho-gWgidiir67eEkY1K6R7S1J6zZ8w==&ch=LFHZc7IljZ8TR8NTu06jQcNTF3JO6UoCVtRchr5kEqNgMA5KcAILFQ==&jrc=1) national paid family leave, free pre-K and free community college, unionization, and require even more tax hikes.
From massive, wasteful spending to disastrous energy policy, and job-crushing taxpayer funded subsidies, the Biden administration is attempting to reorient our economy toward Big Government before the pandemic ends. To put us on a stronger path toward recovery, the exact opposite approach is needed. We should scale back the enhanced unemployment benefits to incentivize work; shift our supply chains out of China and back to the United States; prioritize training for displaced workers; support our energy independence, return kids to school and provide more opportunities to empower working families.
Chaotic signals around April's jobs report are flashing red amid a strong recovery that began in mid-2020. Without a course-reversal to stop the wasteful spending of taxpayer dollars and to allow our consumer-driven economy to recover and reopen, our recovery will fail those who need it most.

clean_body: | | | | | | | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE MONDAY, MAY 17, 2021 ICYMI: BIDEN'S INFLATED POLICIES ARE ALREADY FLASHING RED ATLANTA - In case you missed it, Greater Georgia Chairwoman Kelly Loeffler penned an , hitting Joe Biden for his disastrous economic policies that have stunted our recovery, as evidenced by the April jobs report. The op-ed slams Biden's billions in wasteful spending and partisan boondoggles (like expanding Obamacare and pandering to teachers' unions), as well as his job-killing agenda that ended the Keystone XL Pipeline and has threatened America's energy-independence. Read the full text of Kelly's op-ed below: Americans want little more than their lives to return to normal, to get back to school and work so that their families can prosper. But with the virus tapering off, the Biden administration sees their window of opportunity to radically change our country beginning to close. Thanks to the pro-growth policies of the Trump administration, first quarter GDP rose a healthy 6.4 percent, economic output is at pre-pandemic levels, retail sales are up and consumers are flush with cash. Ignoring the economic recovery, the Biden administration has embraced a "Help is on the way" refrain, rather than embracing the momentum driven by reopening. Now data confirms the administration's earliest policies are pressuring our economic recovery. Start with April's jobs report that missed expectations by an unprecedented 750,000 jobs. At the same time, help-wanted signs abound with a record-setting 8.1 million job openings, alongside rising average wages. Federal benefits now incentivize extended unemployment, with millions of small businesses unable to hire sufficiently to fully reopen. On average, weekly unemployment benefits are nearly $650, roughly equals about $15 per hour for a 40-hour work week. So it's not surprising to see why small businesses are struggling to compete with the government for their employees. And while wage inflation is occurring, it won't go toward quality-of-life improvements if inflationary policies continue. Workers will need those pay hikes amid rising prices for gasoline, food and housing, thanks to this tax-and-spend playbook. The risks to a strong, rapid recovery don't end with dislocations in the labor and commodity markets. When you add the full context of the administration's ominous policies - from open borders to wasteful spending - you can sense the headwinds to our continued economic recovery and security. One of President Biden's first acts was to sign an executive order cancelling the Keystone Pipeline, destroying thousands of jobs and preventing the creation and preservation of many more. Keystone was set to build on our newly achieved energy independence from the Middle East - at a time when Iranian-funded Hamas is conducting strikes on Israel. With the stroke of a pen, Biden signaled his eagerness to trade away our hard-earned energy independence for the Green New Deal, and to thousands of jobs in the process. Not to mention the fact that these very policies put families needlessly at risk of facing the kinds of power outages and gasoline shortages we've already seen across Texas and the South. As if that's not enough damage for the first hundred days, Biden's record-setting spending bills are adding to our national debt, putting more of America's future in the hands of foreign debtors. While the $1.9 trillion "American Rescue Plan" held some needed relief, the vast majority was crammed with partisan , millions to expand Obamacare and billions to pay off teachers' unions who kept kids out of school, and to states who kept their residents locked down. Just 10 percent of that bill was for coronavirus relief, despite the nearly $1 trillion that remained unspent in Congress's 2020 relief bills. But the sugar rush of policy proposals continues, keeping taxpayers on the hook and government at the center of our economy, crowding out small business and consumers. First, the Biden administration's $2 trillion "infrastructure" plan, which allocates less than 5 percent for true infrastructure such as roads and bridges, a massive tax hike that would pressure wages and job creation, transfer billions of taxpayer dollars to corporate welfare, increase regulation and add billions to expand government programs. Second, their $2.5 trillion "families" plan would create more entitlement programs, future generations with more debt, pressure the economy by national paid family leave, free pre-K and free community college, unionization, and require even more tax hikes. From massive, wasteful spending to disastrous energy policy, and job-crushing taxpayer funded subsidies, the Biden administration is attempting to reorient our economy toward Big Government before the pandemic ends. To put us on a stronger path toward recovery, the exact opposite approach is needed. We should scale back the enhanced unemployment benefits to incentivize work; shift our supply chains out of China and back to the United States; prioritize training for displaced workers; support our energy independence, return kids to school and provide more opportunities to empower working families. Chaotic signals around April's jobs report are flashing red amid a strong recovery that began in mid-2020. Without a course-reversal to stop the wasteful spending of taxpayer dollars and to allow our consumer-driven economy to recover and reopen, our recovery will fail those who need it most. | ### Media Contact: mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com | | | | Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | | | | | | Greater Georgia Action, Inc | P.O. Box 550988, Atlanta, GA 30355 | | Sent by mailto:press@greatergeorgia.com powered by

name: Jonathan Feldstein
subject: Israel is Under Attack
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57412070:6KeO86lRN:m:1:3206719985:7511923F337C700C2FB20C5A1AF90571:r "Headline") Peter: If you're following the news, you know this has been a tough week in Israel. Israel continues to suffer from a repeat barrage of rockets fired at dozens of communities overnight. **More than 1,000 rockets have been fired at Israeli towns and cities so far. Mostly overnight disrupting sleep for most Israelis who must seek immediate shelter.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57412070:6KeO86lRN:m:1:3206719985:7511923F337C700C2FB20C5A1AF90571:r "Rocket Attack")**As I write you, the Red Alert app on my phone is sounding feverishly.** Hopefully, you've been praying. The situation is so dire that over 500,000 kids have been sent home from school to prevent a mass casualty incident due to the direct hits and injuries we have suffered, along with loss of property. **These acts of terrorism are increasing by the day. That 's why I am asking you to help us raise $50,000 towards aid for this emergency so we may:**
* Provide emergency medical care for Israelis of all backgrounds
* Comfort terror victims
* Enhance security for Israeli communities being threatened, and
* Care for soldiers who put their lives on the line to protect their people and the Land.

**[Please donate $25, $50, or even $100 and help us provide these emergency supplies to those in need. A blessing in ANY AMOUNT is greatly appreciated.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57412071:6KeO86lRN:m:1:3206719985:7511923F337C700C2FB20C5A1AF90571:r "Please donate $25, $50, or even $100 and help us provide these
emergency supplies to those in need. A blessing in ANY AMOUNT is greatly appreciated.")** We need prayers, but we also need your help so the Genesis123 Foundation can fulfill its mission. **I live in Israel, but more importantly, I need prayers for my son and son-in-law, who were just deployed by the Israeli Army to protect our small but vigilant nation.** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57412070:6KeO86lRN:m:1:3206719985:7511923F337C700C2FB20C5A1AF90571:r "Duck for cover")Just the other night, I was blessed to attend a wedding for the daughter of a very close friend, and all my family was scheduled to be there. **My older son got out of the Army to attend, walked into the house at 5 pm, but by 7:30, he was called back to active duty at a base near Gaza._Shortly after that, my son-in-law was called up into the reserves of the Israeli Military._** In the end, only two of my children were left at the wedding with us with the sounds of rockets landing not far away. To the west of Jerusalem, we saw the plume of smoke from rockets landing nearby. **[Will you help us raise the $50,000 we need to help Israelis impacted by these terrorist attacks?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57412070:6KeO86lRN:m:1:3206719985:7511923F337C700C2FB20C5A1AF90571:r "Will you help us raise the
$50,000 we need to help Israelis impacted by these terrorist attacks?")** If this terrorism doesn't end soon, there may be hundreds if not thousands of Israelis who never make it to another wedding. While America and other parts of the world are beginning to move beyond the COVID-19 pandemic, Israel faces one of its oldest threats-- war and terrorism. We don't know when or how it will end, but Israelis are suffering and desperately need prayers and support. **[Please stand with us today as we provide emergency supplies to those in need throughout Israel! Donate $50, $100, $500, or even $5,000 TODAY!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57412072:6KeO86lRN:m:1:3206719985:7511923F337C700C2FB20C5A1AF90571:r "Please stand with us today as we provide emergency supplies to
those in need throughout Israel! Donate $50, $100, $500, or even $5,000 TODAY!")** Thank you again for your prayers and support. May God's blessings be upon Israel, Jonathan Feldstein
President, Genesis 123 Foundation
---
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system October 22, 2020.

| | Derek,

This is a crisis.

Glenn Youngkin just became the Republican nominee for Virginia Governor. And now Donald Trump has endorsed him in a message to millions of his supporters.

Trump is even calling Youngkin a “patriot” because Glenn is pushing the same sham voter suppression scam he is.

Derek, Donald Trump's brand of "patriotism" is not what Virginia needs. Glenn Youngkin is a dangerous Trump-backed extremist who wants to erase Virginia’s progress by bringing in Trumpism through the back door of the Governor’s office.

Terry has to beat him, and he needs our help.

**[Will you donate to Terry’s campaign right now so he has the resources to go toe-to-toe with Glenn Youngkin and Donald Trump.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29306515/285965595/-2023814932?refcode=20210517_JC_5AV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRhZDIyNi0xZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3Phd34tZYWF8mIjEKZAz0LPqVq0bPJKKnMWvySAuLc=)**

This is about more than Virginia -- experts are saying Virginia’s governor’s race is 2021’s most important election.

It ain't hard to see why -- with Terry leading the charge, Virginia Democrats worked their hearts out to fire Donald Trump and elect Joe Biden.

And it worked.

But here’s the thing, with Trump getting into Virginia’s race, everything we fought for in 2020 is back on the line.

I want to be able to say we’re done with Trump’s era of hate and division. I want to be able to say that our democracy is strong and more people can vote, not less.

But we can’t do that unless Terry wins this thing. I’m counting on you to help make it happen.

**[Please, I’m asking directly, Derek. I need you to step up right now and rush a contribution to Terry’s campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29306516/285965596/-2023814932?refcode=20210517_JC_5AV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRhZDIyNi0xZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3Phd34tZYWF8mIjEKZAz0LPqVq0bPJKKnMWvySAuLc=)**

Let’s beat this guy once and for all,

James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29306517/285965597/-2023814932?refcode=20210517_JC_5AV&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MjRhZDIyNi0xZWI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=M3Phd34tZYWF8mIjEKZAz0LPqVq0bPJKKnMWvySAuLc=)

# [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29307176/285969330/1999088365?refcopde=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5YTdjODhjLTIwYjctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7bvjZBmFn0gw0wpQRB2gC16LFUe0FPq5QLT1T352wk4=)

Friends -
The bottom line is Democrats did not prioritize communicating with Latino voters early on as they did with white swing voters in 2020.
In Florida, a critical state for Democrats, there was no heavy spending until the final 30 days leading up to the general election when over $14 million was spent by Democratic candidates and super PACs on Spanish radio and TV in Miami.
Even more concerning, there was no spending at all on Spanish-language advertising until the last 60 days of the election cycle, more than ever in the history of Florida elections.
Republicans, by contrast, spent millions less but never stopped their outreach to the community since the 2016 election.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29307182/285969344/1999088365?refcode=em-210516&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5YTdjODhjLTIwYjctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7bvjZBmFn0gw0wpQRB2gC16LFUe0FPq5QLT1T352wk4=)
Money can help us get in front of voters, but in order to be effective we must start building culturally competent groundwork now. That is exactly what Nuestro PAC is doing.
**[Can you make a donation of whatever you can afford right now to help power our movement?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/29307185/285969350/1999088365?refcode=em-210516&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNi8xLzg2NjE2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM5YTdjODhjLTIwYjctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTAwNTBmMjcxYjVkOCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=7bvjZBmFn0gw0wpQRB2gC16LFUe0FPq5QLT1T352wk4=)**

name: Senator Patty Murray
subject: I'm running for reelection
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Peter,
As a mom, a grandmother, and a U.S. Senator, I hear constantly from people across Washington state who share my belief in building a stronger America together -- one that is fair and inclusive, where everyone can get health care, a good education, and a good job, and be able to take care of themselves and their families.
But there's no doubt that belief has been tested over the past year. This pandemic has taken its toll on all of us -- while helping to shine a light on so many important issues, from child care and paid leave to affordable health care. It's now more important than ever that workers, families, and communities come first -- not huge corporations or the wealthiest few.
That's why I'm running for reelection. I have laid out a bold vision to support working families -- and we've already made some incredible progress. But all of that is at stake if the GOP takes back the Senate. We need to do everything we can to keep Washington state blue.
**[Peter, will you stand with me today as I launch this fight to defend our progress and keep the Senate blue? Pitch in $5 or any amount right now.](https://act.pattymurray.%3D%3D/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-210510-launch?refcode=em210517i_622&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
I got into politics to help people, solve problems, and make sure all workers and families had a voice at the table. And that's exactly what I've done for my whole career. People and families in Washington state can count on me to continue the fight for their values and their priorities.
In the other Washington, I've made it my mission to cut through the gridlock and dysfunction and bring people together around progressive solutions for Washington state and the entire nation. I'm excited to keep up the fight for all of our families and communities as your voice in the U.S. Senate.
**[Join me on the first day of this must-win 2022 fight. Contribute $5 right now.](https://act.pattymurray.%3D%3D/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-210510-launch?refcode=em210517i_622&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

_ _
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.pattymurray.%3D%3D/?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-210510-launch?refcode=em210517i_622&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=Peter&lastname=&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
_** **_

**_As Washington's senior U.S. Senator, Patty Murray is working to help families, solve problems, and defend our progressive values._**
* * *

Our unemployment rate is higher than nearly any other state in the country. Our infrastructure is failing, our families are struggling, and our state government isn’t doing a thing to help. Thank you for sharing your opinion with us, and thank you for your support. Doug Ose | | PAID FOR BY OSE FOR GOVERNOR Click to unsubscribe.

clean_body: Even Biden's allies are telling him there is a crisis on our Southern Border. ** . == == Did you see this? Even Biden 's allies are telling him there is a crisis on our Southern Border - but the Administration refuses to listen! Americans are paying the price and Biden is ignoring the issue. We need to do better. Republicans like Michelle Steel are calling for action on the Biden Border Crisis. She is a voice for common-sense solutions that will fix our border crisis and get America back on the right track. If securing our border is important to you, Friend, you can help right now to make sure conservative solutions are heard in Washington. == | == == == -> Even though Biden won't call it a crisis, Michelle Steel knows we need to take action. -> Even though Kamala Harris thinks it's a joke, Republicans know it 's no laughing matter.** We need your help to keep Americans safe and secure, and we can do that by fixing this border crisis. == Thank you, Team Steel With so much uncertainty right now, we know not everyone will be able to contribute. But even if you're unable to chip in right now, we could still use your help. == Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress P.O Box 472 Surfside, CA 90743== == == == == | | Michelle Steel for Congress | 8907 Warner Ave Suite 220, Huntington Beach, CA 92647 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativevictory2020.net powered by

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. You can learn more about us at [rslc.gop](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u-L9DLio0jk3Dtl9b8lt0gZb-XDraV7CXSTmrakARdJxyb47ZvVqr08H3lNly0w4U3JdVuQo1F-QSjps1i9z9I8NoHjro8iIXD5ePixNi2louJIdIkR07U5wqsGM-NlDf6bR9qLlBJs=&c=h8SazESoA5T3iulfvTgrqulUG-cZhD0e3vbneu2Xk7llRD1jxqBBNw==&ch=hXKyoh5GawgwXBUEhctfIiUrkW7qRBngeyXagxEVjmJhKkjV02h9Kw==).

President Trump's leadership brought unprecedented peace to the Middle East. NOW, on Joe Biden's watch, we are seeing it CRUMBLE.

subject: Biden is not a king, Peter

No matter what CNN News seems to think.
| Authorized by Republican Headquarters Peter, Joe Biden’s announcement that fully vaccinated people were no longer recommended to wear masks was welcome news. It was also a huge testament to the success of **President Trump’s Operation Warp Speed** initiative (which, by the way, Biden constantly tries to take credit for). But what Biden said next was as shocking as it was un-American: that the “rule” was now to get a vaccine or wear a mask until you do. Joe Biden is not a king, Peter. He doesn’t get to make sweeping “rules” for Americans, period. Yesterday’s announcement was a clear sign that the pandemic, and the Democrats’ “Big Government” paternalism that came with it, are coming to an end. **[Every day that Joe Biden remains in office is a threat to our liberty, our Constitution, and our very way of life. Well, Friend, we missed it.

We missed our goal by $982. And while I know that doesn't seem like a lot, this is enough for the Democrats to start plotting how exactly they're going to defeat me.

While I'm disappointed we just missed our goal, I'm more upset that you stayed on the sidelines, Friend.

want me expelled.

calling out AOC's hate-America Jihad Squad out in front of the
American people.
This is outrageous and yet another attempt to
overturn an election!
STAND WITH MTG -- RUSH DONATE $25

Will you stand with me and chip in $25
right away?
Defunding the police, ripping America's
southern border wide open, Democrats packing the Supreme Court, a
federal takeover of America's elections. . .
These are just some of the socialist power
grabs Democrats are fighting for every singe day.

socialists from bringing America to her knees.

On top of it all, AOC wants to ram her

I'm talking about TENS OF MILLIONS OF DOLLARS
TO DEFEAT ME.
Will you please help me fight back with an

name: Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Action for week of May 17th: Stopping election fraud bills
body:
| |
---
This week, the Democrats are going to try to start pushing other election legislation that is shorter and contains fewer parts than the Corrupt Politicians Act, but is no less dangerous to our republic. You’ve done a great job at letting the Senate know that the Corrupt Politicians Act is toxic, and now we need to do the same with the individual components and these other bills.

Take a look at the action items below, but first, you may want to read through the linked resources to understand these other election bills that Democrats are pushing. We also encourage you to share the articles we’ve linked in this call to action on social media.

_Note: in order to share any links, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
**Call Your Senators**
Call both of your Senators and tell them to:
* Oppose the “John Lewis Act”

* Oppose Sen. Manchin’s proposal to make the John Lewis Act apply to all 50 states

* Oppose any Senate version of the James Clyburn bill in the House, titled, the “Voter Empowerment Act of 2021”

* Oppose any pieces of S.1 that they may try to break off from the big bill and pass alone or attached to other kinds of legislation

* **_Bottomline:_** Oppose all efforts by Democrats to make it easier to cheat in our elections

They are trying to cast that vehicle as being more reasonable, as opposed to only slightly less insane.”_
** **
**We must work hard to make sure Americans and our Senators understand that this bill is just as radical and anti-American as the Corrupt Politicians Act (S.1/H.R.1).**

It is important to make your views known to both of your Senators, even if they are Democrats. If nothing else, you are taking up phone time that could be used by leftists calling in with support of these bills.

Keep an eye on your email for further updates, including names we will want to use for these bills that more accurately reflects what they will do to American elections.

---
Throughout his first 100 days in office, Joe Biden has showed our nation what an abject failure in leadership looks like.

At a time when our nation needs calm, peace and prosperity, Biden seem set on fomenting chaos, ignoring violence and sending us into a recession.

From his push to radically transform national elections to knowingly and willingly speeding up the rate of inflation, Biden has bowed to the radical “progressives” and the results of his disastrous polices are becoming clearer by the day.

Take the case of inflation... or more accurately put, stagflation.

Our economy was, and to some extent still is, poised for one of the most powerful comebacks in history. With even the newly politicized CDC coming to their senses and Americans, en mass, returning to normal life, the free market was set to triumph once again.

Just one problem, the Biden Administration’s disastrous unemployment policy is incentivizing many American workers to remain at home. Thus, as the economy re-opens and demand increases, businesses are not able to meet that demand, creating an increase in the price of existing products. When you combine these two problems - an economic slowdown and higher prices - you end up with stagflation.

Joe Biden’s disastrous policies are not only speeding up the rate of inflation, but they’re also artificially stagnating economic output. This can be seen across markets, with prices rising across the board.
|
---
**Call Sen Manchin**
Call Sen. Manchin’s office (202-224-3954), even if you don’t live in West Virginia. He now wants to make the John Lewis Act apply to all 50 states, and that includes _your_ state. Therefore, he now gets to hear from you about why he needs to stay out of your state’s elections.

[Read this article](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTM3LWQyY2ZiOWJiYmI1NTQxMmFhN2UzNWVjMTkxN2E1ZWQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm94LmNvbS8yMjQzNDA1NC9qb2UtbWFuY2hpbi12b3RpbmctcmlnaHRzLWFjdC1mb3ItdGhlLXBlb3BsZS1qb2huLWxld2lzLXByZWNsZWFyYW5jZS1maWxpYnVzdGVyLXNlbmF0ZT9taWQ9NDM3OTMmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=XZwXh9FUBYW7yYSwWd3r2w) from left-wing site, _Vox_ , about what Sen. Manchin wants to do, before you call his office. What Sen. Manchin is proposing is to require all 50 states get permission from the Civil Rights Division in the Department of Justice to make _any_ changes to their election laws. The DOJ, and particularly that division, is full of Deep State, radical leftists. This will give them the immense power to control even local elections,

**Again, we must work to ensure that all Sen. Manchin and all Americans understand that his proposal is radical, anti-American, and must be defeated!**
|
---
While the progressive puppet in the White House continues to show the nation what failed leadership looks like, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis continues to show the nation what great leadership looks like.

This week, [Gov. DeSantis announced](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIxMTM3LWQyY2ZiOWJiYmI1NTQxMmFhN2UzNWVjMTkxN2E1ZWQ1%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90d2l0dGVyLmNvbS9UUFBhdHJpb3RzL3N0YXR1cy8xMzkyODUwMzI5MjYwMjA0MDM2P21pZD00Mzc5MyZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=nZxQxhJpjt0-Qy5QIxcZ8g) he would be issuing pardons to any Floridian being prosecuted for mask-wearing & social distancing violations, saying:

“...these things with health should be advisory, they should not be punitive, and so we are happy to use our constitutional authority. I think they’ve been treated poorly and fortunately, they got a governor that cares.”
|
---
ICYMI: Senator Rand Paul and Dr. Fauci had another war of words... and, once again, Paul exposed Fauci’s lies.

According to Red State:

_“During Dr. Anthony Fauci’s testimony before a Senate committee Tuesday he was grilled by Sen. Rand Paul (R-KY) about gain-of-function viral research purportedly done in this country or in China through National Institutes of Health (NIH) grants, and he seemed completely unaware of the extent of such research done in this country...._

_“Considering the implications of any revelation that the United States government is funding research that could be used in the development of viral weapons – especially if it was done in conjunction with Chinese scientists in Wuhan – it is understandable that Dr. Fauci would issue such a vehement denial. Among the things that Fauci was adamant about during Tuesday’s testimony was that the National Institutes of Health does not fund gain-of-function research._

_“The problem with most of Fauci’s testimony is that it doesn’t match the record available to us.”_

We believe that the 25th district deserves a representative who _shares our values_ and _believes in our community_ \-- not one like Mike Garcia who spends his time tweeting about everything he thinks is “wrong” with California.

We deserve a representative who puts our interests first -- before party, before politics.

We deserve a representative who will actually put their head down and _do the work_ for our community and our country.

**And really, does Mike Garcia even _care_ about the district he serves?**

_You wouldn’t be able to tell from his congressional record._

He stood with QAnon conspiracy theorist Marjorie Taylor Greene and sided with the insurrectionists who stormed our Capitol.

He voted “no” on the American Rescue Plan, which sent millions of dollars to Californians who needed it.

name: Calvin Hayden
subject: Proud to support Derek Schmidt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC
body:
This is Calvin Hayden, Sheriff of Johnson County. As a Sheriff and lifelong law enforcement officer, I know how important it is to have leaders who wi Friend, This is Calvin Hayden, Sheriff of Johnson County. As a Sheriff and lifelong law enforcement officer, I know how important it is to have leaders who will work with law enforcement to keep our communities safe. With our law enforcement under attack now more than ever before, Kansas needs a Governor who wants to defend, not defund, our police. [**That’s why I’m proud to endorse Derek Schmidt.**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b8b2fe955d1a496bb87459cbe8763af1&_e=_fjMSMY3_SUWyJlvfKvVII2hk6HcDMvV1YfXYnoXchom0-GjusOrj7cO5fBNjNGOMZKE79-GioYjmoB3Pbny6bHUaVp5Rcz6CxkSzID-KrNVIBqzrvVA-dlQHbOfW5i_CmwvwjSjuKhymFqeH01-XmgKmLZU9Q0CRums41GUB2PNnDws-Zlap26Ix_NoSApXkUC4XVlcNrm0oxG4qLszTU6xCY44NhibQdTXCuOCrMnk1KfZviHEKgk3OqTTQ9AiiZepOxRmUapQabW26udidO1aCVd2j5CtqfidCOhPi7zXwpmjyv7nkBgA_kINvQO2aqEVoHy2WPmSu5YGOMDgofMQ-BxNJfFz0R3C-2DBbICulcay_otVwmHDoTqmlc2r5halzpuV-ZzXSkadjQ6v4lvpqxnyum6SpsC3iDTQoFo%3D) [](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b8b2fe955d1a496bb87459cbe8763af1&_e=_fjMSMY3_SUWyJlvfKvVII2hk6HcDMvV1YfXYnoXchom0-GjusOrj7cO5fBNjNGOMZKE79-GioYjmoB3Pbny6bHUaVp5Rcz6CxkSzID-KrNVIBqzrvVA-dlQHbOfW5i_CmwvwjSjuKhymFqeH01-XmgKmLZU9Q0CRums41GUB2PNnDws-Zlap26Ix_NoSApXCluvhIw4kTzrLvsZPT-GDX3EWv7151TKpt3rlqsX3GgNDAOs0z7pQ3l8R9xyRULmA0ricHdQgFRXjI7ExP_W__a3NSP4doRczCzgRPvuJ3NC0IHCoYjoyfRI4KCZa3tmDjYOa5S3eFN_1kEmXvSeDAsxBqysWRqPGoZVjbnE5Fn01RHR7zMEYG7MrKrzvv2wknV2aHc8hYmHKAnRcdSGKaO27jNsjT4YQaJH-D9BQf4%3D) While serving as Attorney General, Derek Schmidt has proven time and time again that he’s willing to do what it takes to be tough on crime. He’s spent his life defending innocent children and cracking down on violent criminals, so I know that Derek will be exactly the leader we need to keep our families safe and protected. [**If you support our law enforcement, click here to volunteer and ensure that Kansas elects a governor who supports them too >>>**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b8b2fe955d1a496bb87459cbe8763af1&_e=_fjMSMY3_SUWyJlvfKvVII2hk6HcDMvV1YfXYnoXchom0-GjusOrj7cO5fBNjNGOMZKE79-GioYjmoB3Pbny6bHUaVp5Rcz6CxkSzID-KrNVIBqzrvVA-dlQHbOfW5i_CmwvwjSjuKhymFqeH01-XmgKmLZU9Q0CRums41GUB2PNnDws-Zlap26Ix_NoSApXPT41pxIv8y5A6xhgPWgFBe__Zhs_jhUjznw8dwZ_y5ROcqsFkvxu4NRyRYa0dYJ0buCCdCJ17oSSQTWCGgie2U1tP2WRcLu1Q3pvzD6fzKI_E_4Ses1-RWsor_seSGHf9_SKo_8WQHbc4EBvXGf6eHwcckp_-2PdnetPQjxCjARoNERK2-takfI-L64tl2lzZYdfTxx_148eGh1v_2ee6ajqfkZluY7kivPO37t5iJU%3D) Derek also understands that in order for Kansas to thrive, we need to strongly support the rule of law and critical protections for all of our families. He’s the best person for the job because he has a strong record of working to uphold the law and support our law enforcement. Will you volunteer to stand in defense of the rule of law and our dedicated law enforcement officers? [**SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER**](http://links.schmidtforkansas.com/u/click?_t=4eb8bd5dcca54a0b993a2eb1eb42ba73&_m=b8b2fe955d1a496bb87459cbe8763af1&_e=_fjMSMY3_SUWyJlvfKvVII2hk6HcDMvV1YfXYnoXchom0-GjusOrj7cO5fBNjNGOMZKE79-GioYjmoB3Pbny6bHUaVp5Rcz6CxkSzID-KrNVIBqzrvVA-dlQHbOfW5i_CmwvwjSjuKhymFqeH01-XmgKmLZU9Q0CRums41GUB2PNnDws-Zlap26Ix_NoSApXCqjN2Vjk3z32K0rjuWTpo8v0g0niL5f0I3fpMtPgWVX9hIO2WnGa3BEwI9AXhekbygBEVFa8Gj2AD7vzIPUL2wfksBF8ja12rn3g-bRd55S9O99Kxibf4JyhyMoQLENC1dFCS3azjzHtSQCbawSS7G_8IrHnixQvwU29NyF57goTS4BtsLk1-rjkfRDFY2fKQCsLJ_tRqqxkRIpX1--81OQZypW9Pdfy_Za0LWSQKnY%3D) Thank you for supporting the brave men and women who risk their lives every day to protect our communities, and thank you for supporting Derek Schmidt, who will work with them to keep our families safe. \-- Calvin Hayden, Sheriff of Johnson County | |
---

As a Sheriff and lifelong law enforcement officer, I know how important it is to have leaders who wi Friend, This is Calvin Hayden, Sheriff of Johnson County. As a Sheriff and lifelong law enforcement officer, I know how important it is to have leaders who will work with law enforcement to keep our communities safe. With our law enforcement under attack now more than ever before, Kansas needs a Governor who wants to defend, not defund, our police. While serving as Attorney General, Derek Schmidt has proven time and time again that he’s willing to do what it takes to be tough on crime. He’s spent his life defending innocent children and cracking down on violent criminals, so I know that Derek will be exactly the leader we need to keep our families safe and protected. Derek also understands that in order for Kansas to thrive, we need to strongly support the rule of law and critical protections for all of our families. He’s the best person for the job because he has a strong record of working to uphold the law and support our law enforcement. Will you volunteer to stand in defense of the rule of law and our dedicated law enforcement officers? Thank you for supporting the brave men and women who risk their lives every day to protect our communities, and thank you for supporting Derek Schmidt, who will work with them to keep our families safe. \-- Calvin Hayden, Sheriff of Johnson County | | | PAID FOR BY DEREK SCHMIDT FOR KANSAS, INC., KELLY ARNOLD, TREASURER.

_This bill would provide $5 billion for safe, high-quality, and fare-free public transportation so everyone can access jobs, food, and essential services._

* * *
Peter, Sharif knows that too many Pennsylvanians have been cut off from access to good-paying jobs, essential services, the best education, and more just because they lack the transportation to get across our Commonwealth. That’s why he’s joining with Democrats across the country to support the Freedom to Move Act, introduced by Rep. Ayanna Pressley and Sen. Ed Markey, which would improve community mobility -- especially for low-income workers, seniors, and folks with disabilities. _**[This bill would begin an infrastructure revolution that would connect our communities in ways we’ve never seen before. Add your name to the thousands of activists who already called on Congress to pass this bill!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29321200/286021166/1709741521?source=group-sharif-street-for-pa&referrer=group-sharif-street-for-pa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fsspa-all-email-may2021-eng-freedomtomove&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ5MDdjZi00N2I3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjhZL4Zmw9Fps9k89VDtNffAcGylHoUI2PEGD5T6aUw=&emci=69d907cf-47b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=6ad907cf-47b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=15053672)**_ [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29321201/286021167/1709741521?source=group-sharif-street-for-pa&referrer=group-sharif-street-for-pa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fsspa-all-email-may2021-eng-freedomtomove&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ5MDdjZi00N2I3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjhZL4Zmw9Fps9k89VDtNffAcGylHoUI2PEGD5T6aUw=&emci=69d907cf-47b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=6ad907cf-47b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=15053672) The Freedom to Move Act would help state and local efforts to promote public transportation through grants to offset fare revenues for transit agencies and would improve the safety and quality of public transportation across the country. It’s time the United States revolutionizes our infrastructure and public transportation to match that of the rest of the world. No one should have to spend hundreds of hours and thousands of dollars just to commute back and forth to work. [_**Add your name if you agree that it’s time we update our public transit system to become more equitable for all!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29321202/286021168/1709741521?source=group-sharif-street-for-pa&referrer=group-sharif-street-for-pa&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fsspa-all-email-may2021-eng-freedomtomove&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzEwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YWQ5MDdjZi00N2I3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HjhZL4Zmw9Fps9k89VDtNffAcGylHoUI2PEGD5T6aUw=&emci=69d907cf-47b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=6ad907cf-47b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=15053672) Thanks for taking part, Sharif Street Exploratory Committee

clean_body: No one should have to spend hundreds of hours and thousands of dollars just to commute back and forth to work. | | Congress Must Pass the Freedom to Move Act! This bill would provide $5 billion for safe, high-quality, and fare-free public transportation so everyone can access jobs, food, and essential services. Peter, Sharif knows that too many Pennsylvanians have been cut off from access to good-paying jobs, essential services, the best education, and more just because they lack the transportation to get across our Commonwealth. That’s why he’s joining with Democrats across the country to support the Freedom to Move Act, introduced by Rep. Ayanna Pressley and Sen. Ed Markey, which would improve community mobility -- especially for low-income workers, seniors, and folks with disabilities. The Freedom to Move Act would help state and local efforts to promote public transportation through grants to offset fare revenues for transit agencies and would improve the safety and quality of public transportation across the country. It’s time the United States revolutionizes our infrastructure and public transportation to match that of the rest of the world. No one should have to spend hundreds of hours and thousands of dollars just to commute back and forth to work. Thanks for taking part, Sharif Street Exploratory Committee Senator Sharif Street has assembled an Exploratory Committee comprised of over 100 leaders from across the Commonwealth representing a diversity of experiences to help him develop a winning policy agenda that'll flip Pennsylvania's Senate seat from red-to-blue! , but if you'd like to receive fewer emails, we understand. name: Rep. Elise Stefanik (House GOP Conference Chair)
subject: Personal note - our shared priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have NEVER been more united to save our country from the Left!

****
****

| | Peter, In spite of the fantastic public schools here in Pennsylvania and across the country, we cannot forget that, as recently as a couple generations ago, racist segregation was firmly and blatantly built into our school systems. Generation after generation of impassioned activists, a tough legal fight, and a Supreme Court victory moved us forward. The _Brown vs. Board of Education_ decision on this day in 1954 was a single, critical link in this chain and a victory for all Americans. **We're long overdue for our next victory, Peter.** Now, 67 years after _Brown_ , our country is still failing Black and Brown families – in schools, in how we fund public education, in the justice system, in health care, in economics. **For too long, White folks have perpetuated the myth that racism only matters when it shows up wearing a white hood or shouting epithets.** But racism also shows up in the ways our society excuses injustice or ignores bias or shrugs because oppression is "just the way things work." Today, I hope you'll join me not only in taking a moment to applaud the Brown decision, but in a commitment to seeing it clearly for what it is: one small, inadequate step toward justice. We're building this movement to build a Senate that won't stop fighting for justice until every child in America has a real chance at following their dreams, regardless of their skin color, economic status, or zip code. clean_body: | | | Peter, In spite of the fantastic public schools here in Pennsylvania and across the country, we cannot forget that, as recently as a couple generations ago, racist segregation was firmly and blatantly built into our school systems. Generation after generation of impassioned activists, a tough legal fight, and a Supreme Court victory moved us forward. The Brown vs. Board of Education decision on this day in 1954 was a single, critical link in this chain and a victory for all Americans. We're long overdue for our next victory, Peter. Now, 67 years after Brown , our country is still failing Black and Brown families – in schools, in how we fund public education, in the justice system, in health care, in economics. For too long, White folks have perpetuated the myth that racism only matters when it shows up wearing a white hood or shouting epithets. But racism also shows up in the ways our society excuses injustice or ignores bias or shrugs because oppression is "just the way things work." Today, I hope you'll join me not only in taking a moment to applaud the Brown decision, but in a commitment to seeing it clearly for what it is: one small, inadequate step toward justice. We're building this movement to build a Senate that won't stop fighting for justice until every child in America has a real chance at following their dreams, regardless of their skin color, economic status, or zip code. As always, I'm honored to stand at your side in this work, John Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY MCGUIGAN FOR PA ---|--- | This email was sent by McGuiganForPA P.O. We’re setting a bold goal of raising $64,819 to support President Trump and elect Trump-Endorsed Republicans, and we know that if everyone reading this email contributes just $35 we’ll reach it in no time. | | | | | | The Democrats are terrified of President Trump returning to the campaign trail. He knows that no one fires up Grassroots Republicans like he does, and they’re right to be afraid. That fight starts now, and we need you to get involved right away. | Thank you. Donald J. This election is CRITICALLY IMPORTANT. Make sure that your voice is heard.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29323902/286033437/-1287071472?refcode=210312_onboard&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE1MjdkOC00ZmI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylYc35G-hrRAcyttd1UfWf8Z8aAkjPxtQ35BqGw77AU=) Derek, **This is your reminder that today is the LAST DAY to register to vote in the June 8th Primary in Virginia!** Luckily, it can all be done online. **[If you (or someone you know) still need to register to vote, simply click here and you'll be redirected to the Virginia Department of Elections site!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29323903/286033438/88044967?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE1MjdkOC00ZmI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylYc35G-hrRAcyttd1UfWf8Z8aAkjPxtQ35BqGw77AU=&emci=661cffdc-27b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=dba527d8-4fb7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=14089178)** Now, more than ever, we're seeing the importance of making our voices heard and the most effective way to do that is by showing up at the ballot box and electing bold Progressives up and down the ballot! This election cycle has come with some unprecedented challenges, but I've been beyond proud of the way that this team has met them all, together. With Early Voting already open and the registration window closing, we're bearing down on the finish line! [**If you're already registered to vote, but still want to help our team in the final stretch -- click here to chip in to Team Samirah today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29323904/286033439/-1001649105?refcode=210517_register&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYmE1MjdkOC00ZmI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ylYc35G-hrRAcyttd1UfWf8Z8aAkjPxtQ35BqGw77AU=) Thanks so much for your support,

| I am proud to endorse your great Congressman Randy Feenstra. Randy ran on a campaign of fighting for conservative values against the radical left, and he has delivered. Randy has only been in office a short time, but he has already made a difference:
* He’s fought against the Democrats’ Radical Agenda which would use your tax dollars to pay for abortions around the world
* He’s helped lead the opposition to the Green New Deal which would destroy Iowa farms while doubling our taxes
* He’s stood up to Biden’s unconstitutional gun grabbing—at the same time the Biden administration and the left are letting violent criminals out of prison

[**Randy made promises, and he has kept them. That’s why he’s now on Nancy Pelosi’s target list.**](http://link.email.dynect.net/link.php?DynEngagement=true&H=UvL%2BUTX4HmCMy%2BAkbY8i27tXRXvL3WZRD49FwLqwgW3H1NA2hWyg%2BdsHL77mtjcH7X9ZmV6Wrr9R92QGH4y7XWujysjChi24AGYy2EEOXWzmdYU%2BZwe5ITbKdh%2Bh%2Fkps&G=0&R=https%3A%2F%2FXORMG4ZTGNA.hatchbuck.com%2FTrackLinkClick%3FID2%3DISkgPW9b1apHCA_LPy4SoaO6NM_4jy1tbVe5Dd3qDvEkQyxcmVcOTOsog0mPcHXL0&I=20210517165227.00000002d43d%40mail6-65-ussnn1&X=MHwxMjcwODUwOjE4MzU0MjQzOTI7MXwxMjcwODUxOjE1Nzc2OTc4NDs%3D&V=3&S=bEKd0Tp73cAv0z9tOwWNSL4Tkkg9D-a5LPkz6EYl1uo) Nancy Pelosi knows that if she can take out Randy Feenstra, she will cement her hold on the House majority. We’ve already seen the damage from leftist control of our government in just five months—imagine four years of this disaster. I’m asking you to support Randy’s campaign so we can take this seat off the map for the Democrats. Let’s not let them even gain a foothold. Will you join me and contribute to Randy’s campaign today?

name: Jennifer Carroll Foy
subject: re: Gloria Steinem endorsed!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor
body:
| | | Making sure you saw this message from Gloria Steinem. Gloria is a feminist, activist, and leader for gender equality. I’m honored to have her support. She’s a trailblazer for women across the country and hero to so many, including me.

While we’ve made so much progress in our Commonwealth, we have a long way to go to truly build a Virginia that works for all people. As Governor, I’ll fight hard for paid family leave, reproductive freedom and justice, and more so that everyone has a fair shot at success in Virginia.

Please take a look at Gloria’s note below and use this link to donate to my campaign:

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jcf_weekly](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-w_NgMTv3vsHQeUyWUa3srlZEvZDkYcHFDZ5dX3h6SK-eLiEAZ-cSaJ2UoseO8A2R9opNSi7fllvb3l1WsLB54WnJXQxs8QVSqv2xjrcqrmJqeC7jknIhqQEbIMHiSgoVLTDKMuoErQqRbZWvSXoYofC9Q6pSM6KyI99gI_yZD3cDyWsCJQPtF9EAOER5-PO_DCn8qPWQiuR40VdUU0FwAgsrjYPvLGe1ZufLYgV819zqeICxwWigcPV7hlR84FbsE4xtKYSTwXNsNKF-q9WOV3z4nxW79Mux9GMD2fnlSjEFkRpTbaNJIwzZHVeyvdjvKvKIYE0lymv2Y9BX5Eajwg/3bz/750INqRPSC-cmQq_b8C9iA/h0/fJO0sbdGfoMAiNJYj-7oDcuPChjVeVbGsc-w9zA7UU0)**

Thanks,

Jennifer

Begin forwarded message:

>
> I’m proud to endorse Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor of Virginia.
>
> **Jennifer can win this election -- but only if she reaches enough voters between now and June 8.[Donate now:](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-w_NgMTv3vsHQeUyWUa3srlZEvZDkYcHFDZ5dX3h6SK-eLiEAZ-cSaJ2UoseO8A2RSIJDg-RIIONv84eRJQcvwF4mhoeX7mvUDs-OJgLa1ImFldHVJEFZVzDWCM8HyMjeTbSTCT-Ph6I_fo_sJhIlQdWjjmMZYVrWGcxVhBybssVmKO70Rq9rEAluR8cZgGBBrKGOqT8tIJnZhcc1Sk0k41r0_1-YF2ygmnvIH9qKfHkhEODNJe7XwVKvl7pzpU6PgCX4U2T6dt7HZuLYRAwBSmPHBe58RrXIITDN1f4Gdb2c9H0NNrp3pjZaHjMPG1jxwzf6JZZZKezAVSq7wRXbqQ/3bz/750INqRPSC-cmQq_b8C9iA/h1/-LxrvT6VptCjR4d4SvPRr3p_PmfZk0Wdc8fatHFerEI)
> **
> [DONATE NOW](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-w_NgMTv3vsHQeUyWUa3srlZEvZDkYcHFDZ5dX3h6SK-eLiEAZ-cSaJ2UoseO8A2RdInns9Zwmg7-Mcsws11R3BrrGunDwEwcmhqz-rH3DzHCs0IFgEp9OnQ2825rolPSOZYBr3MIRwV7denG7YRQfUzTnIezjlzeTs4y33ZC5FZNJU7gLeduAGwL57SUJuwyJoPI52iXG_Evp0J0em6PTBwsyDpZ6940YqARm2mX_Uqx6sgzgO-KIeGogHMNQktNtc7t4UN-N0ItDXap5vAq5gmbUfFLTBV_DlBMBU4936IZ1hX1pF4I9-h-dvED3CxNU7TpZ92GJTGWiPoE_T4WKQ/3bz/750INqRPSC-cmQq_b8C9iA/h2/EErv4w50jaE64zhDtft-MmK4lYqWq24udeqw-cC_IzI)
> I’m endorsing Jennifer because she is the only candidate with the proven ability to take on the status quo that has left women behind.
>
> Jennifer has been a champion for justice her entire life -- from breaking barriers as one of the first women to graduate from Virginia Military Institute, to leading the effort to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment in Virginia and expanding access to reproductive freedom.
>
> And if she wins, Jennifer will be Virginia’s first woman Governor and our nation’s first Black woman Governor.
>
> **In 25 days, Jennifer can win the primary for Governor of Virginia -- but only if we help her now.
>
> [Donate whatever you can today to Jennifer’s campaign. This money will go directly into TV and digital ads sharing Jenn’s story, and into her organizing program across the state.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zYFW-7uXQ-2w7rGjokx6h-w_NgMTv3vsHQeUyWUa3srlZEvZDkYcHFDZ5dX3h6SK-eLiEAZ-cSaJ2UoseO8A2RyDgPLfseGrw36yEowIRsQJFJ4YVQyP2Djt_NQCClEPapE1M58EqWAZr9rCT7tIAiNDaEM8x3nOKg92E94dZ4h4hYciFT2M5YgMEB07XIYzYjT5U95PyUTS3kfZFKBj27tvoTagGk3sB2uxQVKdb78rBerNTZ6PB8ZNnb0Q8d0srX1xISDIKVbFsIzScec4HdGDfKqKLMK0d0izdTo-j_qu41xOqp1Cv869g1d5Qkdwprw7VW-9uS05t1udRv9A-RWnBp8WkPuJOaKl8OKnPR2A/3bz/750INqRPSC-cmQq_b8C9iA/h3/4WWHQBa0F1UBr8S8-NmLdnpok3oLO5DfANkELexv_bc)**
>
> I’m honored to support Jennifer. I can't wait to see her make history this year.
>
> Gloria Steinem
>
>
>
>
* * *
_Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities.

She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor.

Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. **[Help her make history. clean_body: | | | Making sure you saw this message from Gloria Steinem. Gloria is a feminist, activist, and leader for gender equality. I’m honored to have her support. She’s a trailblazer for women across the country and hero to so many, including me. While we’ve made so much progress in our Commonwealth, we have a long way to go to truly build a Virginia that works for all people. As Governor, I’ll fight hard for paid family leave, reproductive freedom and justice, and more so that everyone has a fair shot at success in Virginia. Please take a look at Gloria’s note below and use this link to donate to my campaign: Thanks, Jennifer Begin forwarded message: I’m proud to endorse Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor of Virginia. Jennifer can win this election -- but only if she reaches enough voters between now and June 8. I’m endorsing Jennifer because she is the only candidate with the proven ability to take on the status quo that has left women behind. Jennifer has been a champion for justice her entire life -- from breaking barriers as one of the first women to graduate from Virginia Military Institute, to leading the effort to ratify the Equal Rights Amendment in Virginia and expanding access to reproductive freedom. And if she wins, Jennifer will be Virginia’s first woman Governor and our nation’s first Black woman Governor. In 25 days, Jennifer can win the primary for Governor of Virginia -- but only if we help her now. I’m honored to support Jennifer. I can't wait to see her make history this year. Gloria Steinem Jennifer Carroll Foy was born and raised in Petersburg. In 2017, she flipped a Republican district as a first-time candidate pregnant with twins. During her time as Delegate, Jennifer championed the ratification of the Equal Rights Amendment, helped expand Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians, and advocated for the Commonwealth’s most vulnerable communities. She has a career of public service and it started long before 2017. As a public defender, Jennifer helped give a voice to the often voiceless — children, people suffering from addiction, those experiencing homelessness, those with mental illness, and the poor. Now she’s running to be the first woman elected Governor of Virginia and serve as the first Black woman to be governor nationwide. ** | Paid for by Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor Jennifer Carroll Foy for Governor PO Box 2306 Arlington, VA 22202 United States | | Sent via . body:
He’ll be really touched by all the well-wishes from his supporters.
#

Hi team — it’s Hannah here (Mondaire’s campaign manager).
**[Tomorrow is Mondaire’s 34th birthday, and to thank him for all that he does to fight for working people, I can think of no better way to celebrate than making a contribution of $34 (or whatever you can afford) to help re-elect him to Congress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29325028/286037017/-13329713?refcode2=a8132a58-53b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&refcode=em210517-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODEzMmE1OC01M2I3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yLcbFykbb_enM_0DXvP7uhdJniZhYWpgbu4nX_EcpDg=)**

Your $34 contribution will go directly into making sure our campaign is prepared for any challenge that comes our way. Here’s a link where you can make your birthday contribution:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-em-bday-2021](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29325029/286037018/-13329713?refcode2=a8132a58-53b7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&refcode=em210517-1-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhODEzMmE1OC01M2I3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yLcbFykbb_enM_0DXvP7uhdJniZhYWpgbu4nX_EcpDg=)**
Thanks for your support! I know Mondaire really appreciates having you on our team, and he’ll be really touched by all the well-wishes from his supporters.
Best,
Hannah Nayowith
Campaign Manager, Mondaire For Congress

body:
One seat. That's all that's standing between us and the Senate Majority.
Democrats have:

● Passed statehood for D.C. in the House which would permanently add two new blue senators to the Senate.

body:
#

Hey friend — this isn't the Monday update we wanted to send.
Our team had an ambitious fundraising goal that we were trying to reach before our mid-quarter deadline last Saturday, and unfortunately, we missed it.
That's not great news, especially when some of our opponents are bringing in big bucks from corporate PACs.
**But the good news is that we have a chance to make up the difference right now. We didn’t fall short by much, so if enough people step up right now, we will get there.**
[Can you make one of those donations? | | Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate and Republican nominee for the Virginia Governor’s race, Glenn Youngkin, isn’t hiding why he’s running -- **he wants to enact Donald Trump’s agenda.**

He even went so far as to tell an extremist, right-wing radio show host that Donald Trump “represents so much of why he’s running.”

**[Help Terry McAuliffe stop Donald Trump’s hand-picked candidate by donating $15 or more right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29327780/286045987/-2023814932?refcode=20210517_TW_5AX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmEyOTRiMS01Y2I3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PgAc8hFUhrarGef1V_QrNyX-VLywwctXSrUYVVP_qHY=)**

* Opposed expanding Medicaid to 400,000 Virginians? **Check.**

Glenn Youngkin and his promise to bring Trumpism to Virginia is the most urgent threat to the Commonwealth’s progress in a generation.

**We can’t let them take us back.[Will you pitch in $15 or more right now to help Terry McAuliffe protect Virginia from Youngkin’s extremist agenda?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29327781/286045988/-2023814932?refcode=20210517_TW_5AX&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MmEyOTRiMS01Y2I3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PgAc8hFUhrarGef1V_QrNyX-VLywwctXSrUYVVP_qHY=)**

Derek, Youngkin has a real shot at winning, and if he does, he’s bringing Trumpism back.

Help us make sure he doesn’t get the chance.

body:
This will continue to be America’s future as long as Joe Biden is president and Democrats control Congress... [](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=db7439b84de840b8aa49a680d870e596&_e=rjueObAbv5Gl6eEum7_qNTzrHU6QRYj5mJZJEB0cFxCcolMkEUF1cq5IYCogrJ1huhv9uNn8KI-Flj7fzc3zK6MQIeGuGWpuoTLSFM-Tx3Q1rtMSbZeFIObKaL3XGzsSMor5Sfw2tsIZAb0UsMQzJIMu-TdOJsy6RwO0zZEv4tz1mtYgsmo0GuHck9nP1gFNwCP5ibVMyBLnEqXjuyCSzloS7pxEEhzH3o6JWqZOER_mYC9A1O0djJzc54puYVWW2rXXdbYBEfXlVTSfjmK_IBtKN-yxpUGGN_qP2EY1EZRxbjpd_Uzjrs7yxiLijTmnwrq3sWHOBhQMQP4pUpc20yT1FcOHCYSFnAPaD6VO3WRKcrD6-2q89hm1Bdp463CqsHJMjwMvK5Q-zf7v9qTyBMlubyRnRttA2HFVk7EmGi62VLpylLip7XdJk_ZPKRg5Qq6hj2Qo_q7xCgB_ooi456FH94Og8QLFbrwmllJr6FQ%3D) | |

**_Fuel Shortages..._**

**_Runaway Inflation..._**

**_Shuttering Small Businesses..._**

_Friend, this will continue to be America’s future as long as Joe Biden is president and Democrats control Congress._

_I heard my team reached out to you before the weekend, warning you about what’s happening in our country. _

_We’re watching before our very eyes the_ __destruction of the American economy__ _, the_ __degradation of the middle-class_ ,__and_ __the downfall of America!__

clean_body: I just had my Monday meeting with my team, and I have some bad news... | Fellow Conservative, I just had my Monday meeting with my team, and I have some bad news... This past weekend I had a May mid-month fundraising deadline and unfortunately, I missed my goal. We have one more chance to beat our target and help fight to win back the Senate majority - but I need your help to do it. Look Fellow Conservative - Joe Biden, Nancy Pelosi, and Chuck Schumer are forcing the most progressive agenda our country has ever seen onto hard-working American families. This agenda will decimate the American dream and set our country back for decades. Thank you, Senator Steve Daines | Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. mailto:info@stevedaines.com | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana Don't want to receive our emails? e

Friend ー it’s Jeff Bartos. I wanted to let you know that we have the opportunity to bring freedom back to Pennsylvania tomorrow!

_This is not a drill_ ー **_a crucial vote is coming up tomorrow, Tuesday, May 18th. _**

_**Vote YES on Questions 1 & 2 to take away Governor Wolf’s emergency powers.**_

Governor Wolf has been a complete disaster for Pennsylvania. **He has been running the state with** _**UNILATERAL CONTROL**_**for the last year:**

_→ Our children are_** _SUFFERING_** _ because he inexplicably closed schools indefinitely!_
_→ Our small businesses are_** _CLOSING PERMANENTLY_** _due to his incompetence!_
_→ Our people are hurting because he always chooses_** _FEAR_** _over_ _🇺🇸_** _FREEDOM 🇺🇸_** _!_
[**Limit Governor Wolf’s Power on May 18th**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=98e189d0381549d187e6306dc3a5a491&_e=tAzgZsJRjpjgDsN4MSJIyKSK2hzaM29uBgLssmojyyO3hGAYjfpYq3xXJGzSoUBPXxx7UBWL2r98bumWUJGxM6k60rt1Ox1CuzuxsXHKG4PbAZALRxN4GbW09pkWrzpKwpflYBhzc-tcpGH7pBBQQ713i6iTxgHC-yFmTWq_LaMjr92At-KYkqy9u6ua8Wbg_Y4wnodlFI24nVedF8JAMtpzZzytMri2xgRApPYfxWylqcaHhJ_zLfBkJUNTAiK9RtWpP_dtShV91d18tThfzqCQx9Eu5ras94uBsuV_c0yvNdSLZKSHMBh7gbNziB-lP3zNEQ56Ofju5gdyuahujIVa9A9i3vTZHwrXk_Fpj9_WIEB8rGSj_hfmalyRPxLrtmSBXFLBF7nVrBE5dzlvDyCCzy38Cb5pcuwuFvQfN_hDY-SnTCzjt0hbxpUTqnpRkleFXeSnPXcyVHpHq5qxJEpnMkpjPR-55jZfushNuZeNuJczwMoDSUwRObYyfMpv)
Friend, Governor Wolf’s power must be limited; one person should never have control over Americans’ freedom. _**It’s time to take our freedoms back from this power-hungry administration.**_

_[**Friend, will you commit to limiting Governor Wolf’s Power and Bringing Freedom Back to Pennsylvania?**](http://links.bartosforsenate.com/u/click?_t=c169e432147e4fd9a7a866ea1d4c3484&_m=98e189d0381549d187e6306dc3a5a491&_e=tAzgZsJRjpjgDsN4MSJIyKSK2hzaM29uBgLssmojyyO3hGAYjfpYq3xXJGzSoUBPXxx7UBWL2r98bumWUJGxM6k60rt1Ox1CuzuxsXHKG4PbAZALRxN4GbW09pkWrzpKwpflYBhzc-tcpGH7pBBQQ713i6iTxgHC-yFmTWq_LaMjr92At-KYkqy9u6ua8Wbg_Y4wnodlFI24nVedF8JAMtpzZzytMri2xgRApPYfxWylqcaHhJ_zLfBkJUNTAiK9RtWpP_dtShV91d18tThfzqCQx9Eu5ras94uBsuV_c0xzalwSVQ_vtrVI5GcYGuHS8Suve0_ez-5NaC4fNpLRikJ4rRxkM4waURnFlQeEgVlx6-JigGcPVWffcVEdnWDMS4C1LU_G1F06UOSf4aU9muP-2X8nPBuOWzwNB9abW7xPjw0JM60sXau_F3PGQFclgN70DJX5VnHym4RN6LWzfbe7rajeFzpU4Eo-Gu947xeyk-vhBYPuxKUdphTHurts)_

Jeff Bartos

Peter,

Last month, my grassroots supporters identified Social Security and health care as their top legislative priorities.

So Peter, I’ve worked with my Democratic colleagues to improve your health care and strengthen Social Security for years to come.

**But I know my work is far from over** \-- _and now, I need to hear from you again._

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: not a distant threat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29331592/286060084/-272948131?refcode=MTH_em_20210517_X_ENG_GE_X_ACT_US_all_all_GE_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFiNTYyMi02ZGI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bS0JdpxHZooXYGpBroPDfYw2MRF2EI0tAQ9gtdbYk6Q=&emci=32d258dc-5db7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=f5ab5622-6db7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=252045)

Climate change isn’t a distant threat, folks. It’s a crisis that is already impacting us today. We must take urgent action to combat climate change. This means transitioning to a clean-energy economy _now_. To make this transition at the speed it requires, we also must support the states, counties, and tribal governments that have historically produced fossil fuels. That’s why I’m proud to bring forward the _Schools and State Budgets Certainty Act_. This legislation will help balance our government and education budgets so we can make the right investments in new, sustainable growth opportunities. [**Will you add your name as a citizen co-sponsor of the _Schools and State Budgets Certainty Act_ to help states like New Mexico thrive in a green economy?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29331593/286060086/1193914099?refcode=MTH_em_20210517_X_ENG_GE_X_ACT_US_all_all_GE_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFiNTYyMi02ZGI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bS0JdpxHZooXYGpBroPDfYw2MRF2EI0tAQ9gtdbYk6Q=&emci=32d258dc-5db7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=f5ab5622-6db7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=252045) | [SIGN THE PETITION →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/29331594/286060087/1193914099?refcode=MTH_em_20210517_X_ENG_GE_X_ACT_US_all_all_GE_MTH_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNWFiNTYyMi02ZGI3LWViMTEtYTdhZC0wMDUwZjI3MWI1ZDgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bS0JdpxHZooXYGpBroPDfYw2MRF2EI0tAQ9gtdbYk6Q=&emci=32d258dc-5db7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&emdi=f5ab5622-6db7-eb11-a7ad-0050f271b5d8&ceid=252045)

name: Erica Smith
subject: This is personal for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
I hope you’ll take a moment to read my story.
#
I want to share my personal story navigating a for-profit health care system. I hope you’ll take a moment to read it, and then [**sign my petition to show your support for Medicare for All.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/email_ms_ES_20210517_EA_M4A/?source=em20210517-96&t=1&akid=96%2E3698%2EXu8TYS)
I had a medically-fragile son who needed breathing equipment. It wasn’t optional — he _literally_ would not have been able to breathe without it.
Yet, our health insurance and children's Medicaid didn’t cover anything vaguely close to what was needed to cover the medical equipment his very life depended on.
So to cover the expenses, I picked up part-time work teaching at an alternative school. We sold my eldest son’s car, the same one he relied on to commute to and from his job.
**This was our reality, and _we had health insurance._**
My story isn’t unique — it’s far too common because our broken health care system prioritizes profits over people. That is fundamentally wrong and wholly immoral.
**[It’s time to reimagine our health care system and guarantee health care as a human right for all. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to make that happen. Will you add your name to show your full support for Medicare for All?](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/email_ms_ES_20210517_EA_M4A/?source=em20210517-96&t=2&akid=96%2E3698%2EXu8TYS)**
**[Add your name »](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/email_ms_ES_20210517_EA_M4A/?source=em20210517-96&t=3&akid=96%2E3698%2EXu8TYS)**
Thank you for taking action,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210517-96-footer&t=4&refcode2=96_3698_Xu8TYS&akid=96%2E3698%2EXu8TYS)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=5&akid=96%2E3698%2EXu8TYS)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=96%2E3698%2EXu8TYS)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
