name: Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
subject: BREAKING: Supreme Court to hear challenge to Roe v. Wade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
**Supreme Court will hear direct challenge to Roe v. Wade**
"The court's new conservative majority will have an opportunity to reconsider the landmark decision legalizing abortion nationwide." Peter,

The Supreme Court just announced it will review Mississippi's restrictive abortion ban. This case gives the Court the opportunity to revisit _Roe v. Wade_ and potentially overturn this landmark decision.

After the confirmation of Justice Amy Coney Barrett last fall and a new 6-3 conservative majority on the Supreme Court, it's clear that **our reproductive rights are on the line like never before.**

**[The outcome of this case could be devastating for reproductive rights, so we need to fight back right away. Add your name to stand with Kim and call for the protection of reproductive health care>>](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9470/72735be7/30bd589e/1e101c68/2651936262/VEsH/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/s/protect-reproductive-health-care?gpsid=8_30_18931&source=em21_210517_roe_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210517_roe_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=1+-+The+outcome+of+this+case+could+be+devast")**

| [ADD YOUR NAME](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9470/72735be7/30bd589e/1e101c6b/2651936262/VEsE/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/s/protect-reproductive-health-care?gpsid=8_30_18931&source=em21_210517_roe_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210517_roe_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=2+-+ADD+YOUR+NAME")
---

As a doctor, Kim knows how important it is that each person has the ability to make the healthcare decisions that are right for them and their families. That's why she's fought in Congress to protect and expand access to reproductive health care.

Kim will always work to ensure that reproductive decisions are between a patient and their doctor, only. But she needs to know you're with her in this important fight.

**[If you agree that we need to protect reproductive health care rights, add your name to stand with Kim now.](https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/m/6e4d9470/72735be7/30bd589e/1e101c6a/2651936262/VEsF/?g=Xqd9Y3y8bT5gk4B6WFVyOJA "https://go.drkimschrier.com/page/s/protect-reproductive-health-care?gpsid=8_30_18931&source=em21_210517_roe_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210517_roe_adv_gq_act__ts_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=ksch&utm_content=3+-+If+you+agree+that+we+need+to+protect+rep")**

Thanks,

Team Schrier

**National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022?**

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Need 2 people in 18326 before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Our team is making a final push to hit our mid-quarter fundraising goal, Peter.
**Here’s why it’s so important:** Pramila relies on grassroots donations to fund her work. She doesn’t take a cent of corporate PAC money because she works for the people, not corporate interests.
**Since we launched our mid-quarter fundraising drive,** hundreds of folks have chipped in — our average donation during that period is just $15.81. Pramila takes pride in getting the kind of support from regular folks that makes a $15.81 average contribution possible. She’s not taking massive checks from Big Pharma lobbyists and Wall Street PACs like so many other politicians in DC.
**[We ran the numbers and we can hit our goal before midnight if just 2 people from 18326 chip in $15.81 (or even $5). Can you donate right now and help us catch up on our fundraising for the quarter?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2172?refcode=em20210517-297&t=19&akid=297%2E420207%2E-ldiO7)**
**[Contribute](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2172?refcode=em20210517-297&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=297%2E420207%2E-ldiO7)**
Pramila is leading on so many critical pieces of legislation and advocating for critical support to the American people. She’s a champion for working people — working people who haven’t gotten the support they need during this pandemic, during the last administration, and really, for decades.
For far too long, corporate profits have trumped the needs of regular people in our country. Big money in politics has led to more wealth inequality, more social injustice, and more profiteering. It’s clear that we need a movement to overcome the many injustices that people in this country have faced over decades.
**[Pramila is counting on you to chip in from 18326 to help grow this movement and fuel her urgent work. Can we count on you to give before midnight?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/2172?refcode=em20210517-297&t=21&akid=297%2E420207%2E-ldiO7)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210517-297-footer&t=22&refcode2=297_420207_-ldiO7&akid=297%2E420207%2E-ldiO7)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Rep. Elise Stefanik (House GOP Conference Chair)
subject: Personal note - our shared priorities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
House Republicans have NEVER been more united to save our country from the Left!

****
****
Fellow Conservative, it's Elise Stefanik.

Today I was elected House Republican Conference Chair. I wanted to take a moment to share with you my priorities and mission to fire Nancy Pelosi and put a stop to her radical socialist agenda.

_*****I am only sharing the below memo with a select group of True American Patriots -keep it away from any Democrats!*** **_

There is way too much at risk for people to be sitting idly on the sidelines. We are only _**5 seats**_ away from restoring our majority in Congress - if we can't make that happen, Trump's legacy will be TARNISHED.

Your support is critical to our success right now. While the Democrats are raking in the cash from dark money donors, we're relying on grassroots patriots like yourself to win each and every battle ahead.

name: Laura Loomer
subject: 3,000 Rockets
body:
In 2018, I dubbed them the "Hamas Caucus" and of course the media labeled me as a racist and an "Islamophobe" but three years later, no one is disputing it.
| | | [](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg/763MgoFr7630gj00qAQjAUcP763Q)
Patriot,

[](https://deploy.libersend.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/763jmteJgU3d763dzsFoeA8921Fg/763MgoFr7630gj00qAQjAUcP763Q) In 2018, I dubbed them the "Hamas Caucus" and of course the media labeled me as a racist and an "Islamophobe" but three years later, no one is disputing it.

Even Ted Cruz is calling Ilhan Omar the "Press Secretary for Hamas."

He's right and it's disgusting.

The terrorist organization, Hamas, has fired 3,000 rockets into central and southern Israel over the last week.

Israeli Defense Forces responded - as they should - with overwhelming air strikes.

And how did a sitting member of Congress respond?

**Ilhan Omar said this, "Israeli air strikes killing civilians in Gaza is an act of terrorism."**

Omar didn't condemn the actual terrorist organization, Hamas, for firing THREE THOUSAND rockets into Israeli homes and neighborhoods.

Omar and the rest of the Hamas Caucus are one of the main reasons why I'm running for Congress.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: Thugs should be punished
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Rioters should not be tolerated |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=244983c6b0&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a nearly dead-even district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1fd8ca55aa&e=afa21b7626) \- Florida’s 9th District, held by a Dem career politician I almost beat last year!**

Governor DeSantis has led on so many issues where other lesser politicians have failed us. From opening Florida, to fighting Big Tech, to combatting Critical Race Theory, he has made sure Florida has led the way.

I have to say, as a Floridian, I am proud and impressed. **_This is a rare and special Governor!_**

Recently, he led again- by enacting laws to punish and deter violent rioters, like those that have destroyed Portland, Seattle, LA, New York, Kenosha, and many other cities.

_Gov. Ron DeSantis on Monday signed into law Florida’s "anti-riot" bill, which increases penalties for crimes committed during riots and is aimed at "combating public disorder."

"If you look at the breadth of this particular piece of legislation, it is _the strongest anti-rioting, pro-law enforcement piece of legislation in the country_ ," DeSantis said at a press conference. "There’s just nothing even close."

The law, which goes into effect immediately, grants civil legal immunity to people who drive through protesters blocking a road and allows authorities to hold arrested demonstrators from posting bail until after their first court date. The legislation _increases the charge for battery on a police officer during a riot_ and adds language that could _force local governments to justify a reduction in law enforcement budgets_.

The bill allows people to _sue local governments over personal or property damages_ if they were determined to have interfered with law enforcement response during civil unrest. It also increases penalties for protesters who block roadways or deface public monuments and creates a new crime, "mob intimidation."

Republicans say the bill would protect law enforcement officers and help prevent public disorder following recent unrest in the U.S._

WOW. So this is what this legislation does:

---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=c7f6455014&e=afa21b7626)
---
| There is only one way to stop the aggressive destruction of our cities and terrorizing of our innocent citizens: punish those responsible.

In many ways, these violent rioters are more like domestic terrorists. Similar violent Maoists needed to be put down harshly all over the world; it's time we recognized what these people are and who WE are.

Americans don't become Marxists. We FIGHT Marxists.

Every single day, more of our freedoms are getting taken by the woke crazies of the Biden Administration and their Antifa street army.

**Florida is fighting these Commie thugs. America should as well. I will support companion legislation at a Federal level, punishing these extremists who hate America.**

_Governor DeSantis of Florida is fighting them all- and with incredible efficiency._

I ran in 2020 for this seat, getting more votes than any Republican ever had and nearly beating the incumbent Democrat. _Now I'm back because America needs saving more than ever! I can beat him, I'm starting early, but I need you beside me!_

If you're like me, you value your freedom. If you're like me, you want to fight for it! [Can you help me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f08235af67&e=afa21b7626)

[Can you join me in bringing Florida's successful legislation to Congress?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=1ffecaf9f9&e=afa21b7626)

The reality is clear - we need control of Congress. [Help me restore our freedoms and protect our innocent citizens from Communism!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=82b9a3e483&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=580a0a5c6d&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=9a2e94b02e&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I really need your help today, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - [WITH YOUR HELP](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=bfe072a5a3&e=afa21b7626)! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.
---
| |

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

subject: Murphy Won't Follow the Science
body:
Even Andrew Cuomo and Bill DeBlasio are ending mask mandates | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/hirshsingh/murphy-wont-follow-the-science?e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=533e3be7f9&e=3e017fab0f)
---
| | Dear Friend, Phil Murphy has made it official: he won’t follow the science.

Instead, Murphy is scheming to continue unconstitutional mask mandates and draconian lockdowns.

While liberals like Andrew Cuomo and Bill DeBlasio are ending mask mandates in New York, Murphy refuses to give up the control and power that comes with regulating our lives.

[Let’s throw Phil Murphy out of office](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=8287e00f4f&e=3e017fab0f):
* End the mask mandates!

* End the lockdowns!

* Prohibit forced vaccinations!

* Pardon everyone charged with a no-mask "crime"!

I’m running for Governor to restore our state to its rightful place as a global leader in industry, innovation, and individual freedom.

In short, [I’m running for Governor to save New Jersey from Phil Murphy](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=2ee7066a57&e=3e017fab0f).

The people of New Jersey are ready for a leader who trusts them to safely re-open and who won’t cave to the radical left, Trenton RINOs, or Washington politicians.

I’ll be a leader who empowers the people — not the government — to make the best health decisions they can for themselves.

And, on Day One, I’ll unleash the full economic potential of our people and our state to re-open and rebuild.

You can help me get there. [Join our team today](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=9e82b911fb&e=3e017fab0f).
---
| Sincerely,

**Hirsh V. Singh**
Make New Jersey Great Again

---
| PS: If Phil Murphy won’t reopen New Jersey now and empower We the People, I will. But establishment hacks in Trenton and Washington are spending millions smearing my good name. [I’ve proven I’m not afraid of the fight, but I need your help to stand up to them and win](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=40a7857a7b&e=3e017fab0f). Join our team now.

**-Hirsh**

clean_body: Even Andrew Cuomo and Bill DeBlasio are ending mask mandates | | | | | | | Dear Friend, Phil Murphy has made it official: he won’t follow the science. Instead, Murphy is scheming to continue unconstitutional mask mandates and draconian lockdowns. While liberals like Andrew Cuomo and Bill DeBlasio are ending mask mandates in New York, Murphy refuses to give up the control and power that comes with regulating our lives. : End the mask mandates! End the lockdowns! Prohibit forced vaccinations! Pardon everyone charged with a no-mask "crime"! I’m running for Governor to restore our state to its rightful place as a global leader in industry, innovation, and individual freedom. In short, . The people of New Jersey are ready for a leader who trusts them to safely re-open and who won’t cave to the radical left, Trenton RINOs, or Washington politicians. I’ll be a leader who empowers the people — not the government — to make the best health decisions they can for themselves. And, on Day One, I’ll unleash the full economic potential of our people and our state to re-open and rebuild. You can help me get there. . | Sincerely, Hirsh V. Singh Make New Jersey Great Again | PS: If Phil Murphy won’t reopen New Jersey now and empower We the People, I will. But establishment hacks in Trenton and Washington are spending millions smearing my good name. .
